aries.horoscope_text: Recent developments have brought new interests into your life, Aries. As a result, you might be seriously considering enrolling in a formal course of study in the future involving these subjects. Discussing these aspirations with community members and consulting educational materials could prove beneficial during this period.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — great day to research options, not push to prod.
aries.prophecy: The stars say invest in your education today. You'll add 14 tabs of tutorials to a bookmarks folder you'll never open.

taurus.horoscope_text: Your mind is especially sharp, Taurus. You're logical and objective by nature. However, today you're likely to find that your thinking is more influenced by feeling than usual. This is a positive development. It demonstrates that your intuition is operating at a high level, so don't fight it. This is definitely the day to follow your heart rather than your head.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — your gut says ship it. Your gut has been wrong before.
taurus.prophecy: The stars say trust your intuition today. Your gut says merge without review. Do not merge without review.

gemini.horoscope_text: A group you're involved with may want to discuss a future trip of some kind, Gemini, perhaps to a convention. The drive to expand your horizons is very strong today. Therefore, trips like this or other opportunities to learn and grow can be especially appealing. You might come up with a few ideas of your own that you prefer to pursue alone.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — the team wants to discuss a conference trip that's actually a 3-hour planning meeting.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say expand your horizons today. Your team wants to discuss an offsite that could've been a Slack message. 🙃

cancer.horoscope_text: Your intuition is operating at a very high level today, Cancer. You tend to follow your heart by nature, so you don't always go out of your way to be logical or objective. However, more than one event could occur during the day in which it's imperative that you go with your intuition even though it defies all logic. Have a little faith and go with your gut!
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — logic says wait for QA, your gut says ship. Trust cautiously.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say trust your gut over logic today. Your gut says skip the tests. Please do not skip the tests. 😰

leo.horoscope_text: Today should be a gratifying day, Leo, full of great news, pleasant surprises, and opening doors of opportunity on just about every level. Career advancement, financial gains, new social connections, and travel or educational prospects are possible, though decision-making might prove challenging.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — everything's opening up today. Ship it before the doors close.
leo.prophecy: The stars say opportunity knocks on every door today. Your manager finds the one you forgot to lock. 🔥

virgo.horoscope_text: Paperwork involving financial transactions may need to be handled today, Virgo, but it won't be as tedious as you think. Whatever information is required is easily obtained. Most of what is presented to you should be clear and understandable, and the people involved helpful. It's important that you do get this done. In the evening, schedule a romantic encounter, if possible. Your level of passion is rather high!
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — paperwork's clear, docs are clean. Ship it.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say handle financial paperwork today. Turns out it's just approving your own AWS budget request. 💸

libra.horoscope_text: A friend could put you in touch with a lot of interesting people, some in fields such as law, education, or the ministry, Libra. Discussions about social and ecological responsibilities take place today. Rather than dominating conversations, you're more inclined to listen and absorb others' perspectives.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — good day to listen in standup instead of talking.
libra.prophecy: The stars say listen more than you speak today. Perfect, since your only update was 'no updates.' 🙃

scorpio.horoscope_text: You may spend much of your day trying to sort out financial matters for yourself, your job, or perhaps for a friend or relative, Scorpio. Managing these responsibilities will require substantial effort, including phone calls and online research, but you'll approach these tasks with determination and experience fulfillment upon completion.
scorpio.deploy_today: Maybe — busy sorting the finances, aka the AWS billing dashboard, today.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say you'll spend the day sorting financial matters. Translation: you'll spend all day fighting the AWS billing dashboard. ☕

sagittarius.horoscope_text: Today you might spend a lot of time with the special person in your life if that's possible, Sagittarius. Romance and affection are definitely a powerful factor in the course of your day, but much of what might bring you closer together is conversation. You're likely to exchange information that interests you both about specific subjects, yourselves, and future plans. A short journey might also take place.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — you're focused on someone special today, not the sprint.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say deep conversation and romance await. It's just you and your rubber duck debugging again. 💭

capricorn.horoscope_text: The possibility of some future houseguests might have you checking your home to see what needs to be done to make it presentable, Capricorn. It may need a few minor repairs, and you could do some online shopping to dress the place up a little. Your mind might be working more quickly than your body, however. Take care not to push yourself too hard.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — mind's racing, body's tired. Save the deploy for tomorrow.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say prep for houseguests with minor repairs. Translation: minor bug fixes nobody asked for while the real backlog rots. 🛠️

aquarius.horoscope_text: Today you might decide to participate in activities involving children, Aquarius. Field trips either for pleasure or educational purposes may take place, and letters and phone calls could bring good news from far away, which you'll almost certainly want to pass on to others. Tonight, curl up with the latest mystery. Intrigue should be especially appealing now.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — good news incoming, but you're mentally on a field trip.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say good news arrives by letter or call today. It's Slack, and it says 'quick sync?' 📞

pisces.horoscope_text: Your financial situation looks particularly good right now. An increase in income could be coming your way, Pisces. The downside could be that contracts might be involved, and you'll have to spend time perusing boring legal documents that need to be executed. A lot of people could reach out to you tonight, probably to exchange ideas and information. Don't talk or text for too long. You'll want to get some sleep!
pisces.deploy_today: Maybe — numbers look good but there's fine print. Read it before you ship.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say a raise is coming. It's actually just the on-call stipend, and it comes with 40 pages of legal docs. 📄
